nodes.name: Short-billed honeycreeper
nodes.summary: Short-billed honeycreeper（Cyanerpes nitidus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Short-billed honeycreeper。

nodes.name: Cyanerpes
nodes.summary: Cyanerpes（Cyanerpes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Short-billed honeycreeper、Shining honeycreeper、Purple honeycreeper等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Short-billed honeycreeper
nodes.summary: The short-billed honeycreeper (Cyanerpes nitidus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
